languages.dialogDescription: Choose the language used across Racing Planner.

cars.title: My Cars
cars.description: Mark the cars you own and select your favorites. Use the wishlist to preview the content before you buy it.

tracks.title: My Tracks
tracks.description: Mark the tracks you own and select your favorites. Use the wishlist to preview the content before you buy it.

season.title: My Season
season.description: Plan your season weeks from your favorite series, use the settings dropdown options to customize the table.

series.title: My Favorite Series
series.description: Select the series you want to see in your season planner

shop.title: Shop Guide
shop.description: See the tracks most used by your favorite series. Checkout your wishlist items at iracing.com

history.title: Tracks Usage History
history.description: See the most used tracks of all time by iRacing

schedule.title: My Schedule
schedule.description: Your planned races for each week. Select the tracks you plan to race from the My Season page.

settings.showContentCheckboxesTooltip: Show track checkboxes to quickly switch tracks you own
settings.showCarsDropdownTooltip: Show cars dropdown to quickly switch cars you own
settings.showTrackConfigTooltip: Show track configuration used that week
settings.highlightHoverTooltip: Highlight all cells with the same hovered track
settings.showWishlistTooltip: Whether wishlist items should be colored
settings.showOwnedTooltip: Whether owned items should be colored
settings.showParticipationTooltip: Whether series where you own enough tracks for a reward should be colored
settings.showRainTooltip: Show rain indicators for tracks with chance of rain
settings.localTimezoneTooltip: Convert race times from UTC to your local time zone
settings.volumeDiscountTooltip: Apply iRacing discounts for bundle purchases
settings.volumeDiscountLink: Go to iRacing's official Volume Discounts blog post

counts.freeTooltip: Available for free with an iRacing subscription
counts.wishlistTooltip: Content you wish to buy, select to preview it in your season planner

empty.noFavoriteSeries: You didn't choose any favorite series
empty.goSeries: Go directly to the My Series page
empty.addWishlist: Add some cars or tracks to your wishlist
empty.ownAllFavoriteTracks: You already own all tracks of your favorite series
empty.selectSeriesSchedule: Select series and schedule races from the My Season grid
empty.goSeasonSchedule: Go to My Season to select races

export.heading: Transfer Your Settings to Another Device
export.description: Easily bring your site settings to another device! Just copy the link or scan the QR code below to transfer all your preferences instantly. No need to set everything up again, just load and go!
export.replacePreferencesWarning: Loading this transfer will replace all your current preferences with the new ones. This action cannot be undone. Do you want to continue?

about.dataUpdatesText: The content on this site is updated at the beginning of every iRacing season. All data is fetched directly from the iRacing public API.
about.changeLogText: For detailed update history, visit the Change Log.
about.feedbackText: Your feedback will be highly appreciated! If you have any suggestions or encounter issues, please consider opening an issue at the <repo>GitHub Repository</repo> or send me an <email>email</email>.
about.disclaimer: This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by iRacing.com.
about.creator: The Creator
about.creatorText1: My name is Adriano Lima, I am from Brazil and have been passionate about sim racing since 2010. I started with rFactor and later explored other simulators until I finally gave iRacing a chance in 2020. Sim racing has always been a hobby for me, but recently, I've been working to improve my driving techniques.
about.creatorText2: As a software developer, I've always enjoyed exploring iRacing APIs. In the past, I created a Twitch bot and an Overlay prototype, and now I'm excited to present this project. Every season, I find myself wondering which tracks and cars to purchase. This tool was initially designed to address my own needs, but I hope it will also be helpful to the broader iRacing community.
about.contributorsText: This project would not have been possible without the help and support of the following contributors:

privacy.collectedDataText: I do not collect or store any personal or sensitive data from users.
privacy.localStorageText1: This site uses your browser's localStorage to save UI settings like theme and language, and also the tracks and cars marked as owned or wished.
privacy.localStorageText2: This data is stored locally on your device and is not sent to the servers or shared with any third parties.
privacy.analyticsIntro: I use Google Analytics to track:
privacy.pageVisitsText: Used to track the amount of visits the site receives
privacy.outboundClicksText: e.g., clicks on the "Checkout" button leading to the iRacing.com store page
privacy.analyticsText: Google Analytics collects only aggregated and anonymized data. This information is used solely to understand how our site is being used and to improve the user experience.
privacy.thirdPartyText: This site contains a link to a third-party website (iRacing.com). Once leaving this site, the privacy practices and content of the external website are not controlled or managed by this site.
privacy.choicesText1: You can control your localStorage data by clearing your browser's cache.
privacy.choicesText2: To opt out of Google Analytics tracking, you can use the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact me by <email>email</email> or create an issue at the <repo>Github repository</repo>.

help.seriesText1: Select your favorite series. Your chosen series will appear at the Season Planner page.
help.seriesText2: Use the <star>Star Checkbox</star> to mark your favorites
help.contentText1: These pages allow you to see the details of each content and to select the content you <owned>own</owned> and the content you <wish>wish</wish>.
help.contentText2: Your selections on these pages will directly reflect on the Season Planner Page, helping you analyze your content more effectively.
help.checkboxIntro: The app uses a unique checkbox system to help you manage your iRacing content. The checkbox has four states:
help.unchecked: Unchecked: The content is not owned or wishlist.
help.checkedWishlist: Checked (Wishlist): Marks content you wish to purchase.
help.checkedFree: Checked (Free): Marks content included for free with the iRacing subscription.
help.cycleStates: Keep clicking to cycle all states.
help.seasonText1: The season page is the central hub of the app and the first page you will see when you open it.
help.seasonText2: Once you select your favorite series, this page displays a comprehensive table of series and the tracks and cars they use.
help.redCells: Red cells: Represent the tracks you don't own.
help.greenCells: Green cells: Represent the tracks free with subscription.
help.tealCells: Teal cells: Represent the tracks you own.
help.blueCells: Blue cells: Represent the tracks you added to your wishlist.
help.shopText1: See the list of all non-free used tracks of the current season, and you have one more place to wishlist content.
help.shopText2: All wishlist items will be presented as a cart with the total price and discount if applicable. Use the <button>Checkout Button</button> to complete the purchase at the <store>iRacing.com</store> store.
help.themeText: Choose your theme from light and dark options.
help.privacyText: No personal data collected, visit the Privacy Policy for detail.
help.feedbackText: Send me an <email>email</email> or create an issue at the <repo>Github repository</repo>.
help.pwaText: This site can be installed as a Progressive Web App (PWA) for a more app-like experience. Follow the steps below to add it to your home screen:
help.iosStep1: Open this site in Safari on an iPhone or iPad.
help.iosStep2: Tap the Share button (the square icon with an arrow pointing up).
help.iosStep3: Scroll down and select Add to Home Screen.
help.iosStep4: Confirm by tapping Add in the top-right corner.
help.androidStep1: Open this site in Chrome on an Android device.
help.androidStep2: Tap the Menu button (three dots in the top-right corner).
help.androidStep4: Confirm by tapping Add and choose whether to add it automatically or manually.
help.pwaDone: After adding, the PWA will appear on the home screen and behave like a native app, offering a seamless experience.

content.nurbCombined: Nürburgring Combined is the combination of both the Nürburgring Grand Prix Strecke and Nürburgring Nordschleife. In order to have access to it you must own both tracks.

schedule.weeklyEvery2: Races weekly every 2 hours starting at {{time}}

schedule.racesEveryHourOn: Races every hour on {{days}} starting at {{time}}
schedule.racesEvery2On: Races every 2 hours on {{days}} starting at {{time}}
schedule.racesEveryMinutesOn: Races every {{minutes}} minutes on {{days}} starting at {{time}}
schedule.noRacesSelected: No races selected for this week
